name: AWP | 红线
descriptionEn: High risk and high reward, the infamous AWP is recognizable by its signature report and one-shot, one-kill policy. It has been painted using a carbon fiber hydrographic and a dry-transfer decal of a red pinstripe. Never be afraid to push it to the limit
descriptionZh: 高风险，高回报，恶名昭彰的 AWP 因其标志性的枪声和一枪一个的准则而为人熟知。 这把武器使用碳素纤维的花纹和红色细条纹风格的干式转印贴花进行了涂装。 别顾忌，将威力发挥到极致
